name: Sequence Detector (0011)
description: A clean-room overlapping serial detector for the pattern 0011, taken spec → lint → simulation → GDS on the SkyWater sky130hd PDK entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Interactive: open seq_detector_0011.dashboard.html and feed the netlist a bit stream by hand
source_note: Clean-room spec + RTL/TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally (native iverilog sim + local ORFS synth).
